# CWE-940 positive: no origin verification on OAuth callback (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-940-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-940: Improper Verification of Source of a Communication Channel.
// Vulnerable: OAuth callback trusts any redirect without state/origin checks.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func OAuthCallbackPure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		code := r.URL.Query().Get("code")
		userID := r.URL.Query().Get("user_id")
		_, err := db.Exec(
			"INSERT INTO oauth_tokens (user_id, code) VALUES ($1, $2)",
			userID, code,
		)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		http.Redirect(w, r, "/dashboard", http.StatusFound)
	}
}
